title: memo-init Harness Tool Inventory (WI-2-05)
description: The 42-tool snapshot of the official Claude Code tools reference (code.claude.com/docs/en/tools-reference.md, snapshot 2026-07-10, T026). One array entry per tool; the tool `name` is the exact contract string used by permission rules, subagent tool-lists and hook matchers. Deprecated/renamed history is carried on the affected entry (status + replacedBy/renamedFrom + note) because the array holds only the current 42 rows.

name.description: the exact tool contract string (as used in permission rules / subagent tool-lists)

status.description: active (in the current contract), deprecated (superseded, still listed), or renamed (the entry is the new name of a formerly differently-named tool)

replacedBy.description: for a deprecated tool: the tool(s) that supersede it (comma-separated when several)

renamedFrom.description: for a renamed tool: the historical name this entry replaced (e.g. Agent renamedFrom Task)

note.description: additional provenance (version numbers, platform limits, removed sibling tools)

source.description: the tools-reference (and CHANGELOG) line the row was captured from
